description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Code Scan: Cpplint that runs on push to devel and release branches and on pull requests to those branches, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should cancel in-progress runs if a newer run starts on a non-devel and non-release branch. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with read permissions for actions and contents and write permission for security events. Check out the repository with submodules, install cpplint, xsltproc, and sarif tool, run cpplint, convert results to SARIF and Markdown, and upload SARIF file to GitHub Code Scanning Alerts.
